ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "exp_time" REAL /* Exposure time for the observation */,
  "obs_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the observation was made */,
  "hardness" REAL /* Hardness value observed */,
  "var_mean" REAL /* Mean variability */,
  "var_sigma" REAL /* Standard deviation of variability */,
  "cnts_aper" REAL /* Counts per aperture */,
  "flux_aper" REAL /* Flux per aperture */,
  "flux_aper_hilim" REAL /* High limit of flux per aperture */,
  "flux_aper_lolim" REAL /* Low limit of flux per aperture */,
  "flux_significance" REAL /* Significance of flux measurement */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telescope used for the observation */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target of the observation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the observation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the observation record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation record was last updated */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Measure of the quality of the observation data */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the observation */,
  "observer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes made by the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescopes" (
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telescope */,
  "telescope_name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the telescope */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used */,
  "aperture_size" REAL /* Size of the telescope's aperture */,
  "focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the telescope */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telescope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telescopes_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telescope the instrument is mounted on */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of detector used in the instrument */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the instrument */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the instrument */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_detector_type FOREIGN KEY ("detector_type") REFERENCES detectors ("detector_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "detectors" (
  "detector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detector */,
  "detector_name" TEXT /* Name of the detector */,
  "detector_type" TEXT /* Type of the detector */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the detector */,
  "pixel_size" REAL /* Size of the detector's pixels */,
  "field_of_view" REAL /* Field of view of the detector */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the astronomical target */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the target (e.g., star, galaxy, nebula) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the target (e.g., RA, Dec) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the target */,
  "redshift" REAL /* Redshift value of the target */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the target */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the request is for */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the data request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation analyzed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the analysis is part of */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that led to the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who is the author */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_instruments" (
  "obs_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_instruments_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_targets" (
  "obs_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_targets_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_observations" (
  "pub_obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_observations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_observations_obs_id FOREIGN KEY ("obs_id") REFERENCES observations ("obs_id")
)
